description: Evals for spec-to-mobile-design — verifies triggering accuracy and functional behavior

evals.prompt: Create a mobile design from the spec
Design the iOS and Android screens for the onboarding feature
evals.description: Trigger via explicit platform mentions (iOS + Android)

evals.prompt: Generate a DESIGN.md for our React Native notifications spec
evals.description: Trigger via mobile framework name (React Native) as signal

evals.prompt: Design the feature from the spec
evals.description: Should trigger spec-to-design (web), not spec-to-mobile-design — no mobile signal

evals.prompt: Generate an implementation plan from the mobile spec
evals.description: Should trigger spec-to-plan, not spec-to-mobile-design — planning, not design
